subcodes.first_line: God grant, O Riḍá, that thou art illumined with the splendors of the light of the Sun of Truth, and that thou art voicing the praise of the Incomparable Friend
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضی انشاء الله از تجلیات انوار آفتاب حقیقت منور باشی و بذکر دوست یکتا ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @incarceration of Baha'u'llah in Siyah Chal, @suffering and imprisonment, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
